mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hall(hall_id, seat_id, seat_count, movie_time, start_time, movie_id, today_show_cnt) VALUES(#{hallId}, #{seatId}, #{seatCount}, #{movieTime}, #{startTime}, #{movieId}, #{todayShowCnt})
mapper.select: SELECT hall_id, seat_id, seat_count, movie_time, start_time, movie_id, today_show_cnt FROM hall WHERE hall_id = #{hallId} ORDER BY seat_id
SELECT hall_id, seat_id, seat_count, movie_time, start_time, movie_id, today_show_cnt FROM hall ORDER BY hall_id, seat_id
